name: Epidemic
ability: Evil players "are the Demon". Each night, a fresh player chooses a player: they become their alignment. [No Minions. 1 player is evil]
flavor: YUCK!! Why am I so slimy?! (v1.0)
firstNightReminder: Wake a player that has yet to change alignments due to the Epidemic's ability. They choose a player. :reminder: Put them to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* & a thumbs up or thumbs down.
otherNightReminder: Wake a player that has yet to change alignments due to the Epidemic's ability. They choose a player. :reminder: Put them to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* & a thumbs up or thumbs down.
